data.title: Tether invests €30m in Bit2Me to grow in EU and LATAM
data.description:
Tether invests EUR 30 million in Bit2Me, the first Spanish-language exchange with a MiCA licence. The deal aims to expand its presence in Europe and Latin America, with a focus on Argentina, bypassing EU regulatory barriers.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/bitcoin/tether-invests-eu30m-in-bit2me-to-grow-in-eu-and-latam/

data.title: Bitcoin Act Is Still America’s Playbook, Clarifies Senator Lummis
data.description:
A morning soundbite from Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent briefly rattled Bitcoin and crypto markets on Thursday before a late-day clarification restored the policy baseline: the United States won’t be sellers, and “budget-neutral” options to grow the country’s bitcoin stockpile remain on the table. Senator Cynthia Lummis swiftly framed the endpoint. “America needs the BITCOIN Act,” she wrote, calling the legislation the operative blueprint for expanding a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve without tapping taxpayers. In a Fox Business hit that ricocheted across X, Bessent said the government is “not going to be buying” additional bitcoin and added, “We’re going to stop selling that,” referencing a reserve he valued between $15 billion and $20 billion
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-act-still-america-playbook-senator-lummis/

source: https://cryptonews.com/news/new-york-assembly-bill-seeks-0-2-excise-tax-on-crypto-and-nft-transactions/

data.title: Major stablecoin issuers launch proprietary chains threatening Ethereum L2 strategy
data.description:
15-8-2025 – Stripe, Circle, and Tether’s recent deployment of proprietary blockchain networks poses a direct challenge to Ethereum’s Layer 2 ecosystem, according to analysis. The proprietary chain trend reflects stablecoin issuers’ preference for complete operational control over their infrastructure rather than relying on decentralized security models. These companies prioritize capturing sequencer revenue, MEV opportunities, and [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/major-stablecoin-issuers-launch-proprietary-chains-threatening-ethereum-l2-strategy/

data.title: ALT5 Sigma Corporation Appoints New Chief Financial Officer
data.description: According to Foresight News, ALT5 Sigma Corporation, a publicly traded company utilizing WLFI financial strategies, has announced the appointment of Jonathan Hugh as its Chief Financial Officer. Jonathan brings over 25 years of senior financial and business leadership experience in digital assets, technology, energy, and commodities trading. He has previously served as the Chief Financial Officer for global market maker GSR International and regulated institutional custody firm Zodia Custody.

data.title: Global stocks, gold, Bitcoin and oil remain up ahead of Trump-Putin summit in Alaska
data.description:
Global stocks, Bitcoin, oil, and precious metals all climbed on Thursday as traders braced for the high-stakes Friday summit between Trump and Putin.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/stocks-gold-bitcoin-oil-trump-putin-summit/

data.title: US Regulator Slaps Wells Fargo’s Investment Arm With $275,000 Fine – Here’s Why
data.description:
A self-regulatory organization that oversees member brokerage firms and exchange markets just slapped Wells Fargo’s investment operation with a $275,000 fine. The Financial Industry Regulatory Authority (FINRA) says it imposed the penalty following Wells Fargo Clearing Services’ failure to comply with the organization’s rules.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/08/15/us-regulator-slaps-wells-fargos-investment-arm-with-275000-fine-heres-why/

data.title: Strategy Nears Inclusion in S&P 500, Signaling Bitcoin's Growing Influence
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, asset management firm Strive has commented on Strategy's market position, noting that the company is on the verge of joining the S&P 500 index. As the world's largest Bitcoin treasury company, achieving this milestone would significantly enhance Bitcoin's role in the U.S. financial landscape. Strategy's market capitalization exceeds $100 billion, surpassing the S&P 500's threshold. However, inclusion criteria also require U.S. registration, listing on a major exchange, and profitability over the past quarter and year, the latter of which has been a hurdle for Strategy.

Recently, Strategy released its second-quarter financial report, showing profitability over the last 12 months, potentially clearing the final obstacle for inclusion as early as September. Nonetheless, Strategy's inclusion is not guaranteed. In 2020, the S&P 500 opted for the smaller Etsy over Tesla, without providing a clear reason, though analysts suggested Tesla's volatility was a concern. Strategy faces a similar challenge, with a five-year beta coefficient of 3.86, making it potentially the most volatile company in the S&P 500, nearly twice as volatile as Tesla.

Regardless of whether Strategy is included in the S&P 500 in September, it is evident that Bitcoin is transitioning from a currency experiment to a blue-chip asset.
